message.content:
CRITICAL: Verify if removing getParameterPointsProgram() call changed behavior.

The progress.txt states: "Fixed: Removed redundant getParameterPointsProgram() call in useEffect since requestInitialData() already calls it internally"

I need you to:
1. Read src/screens/Points/index.tsx - find the useEffect hooks
2. Read src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts - check what requestInitialData() does
3. Verify if getParameterPointsProgram() was truly redundant OR if it was called at a different timing/condition
4. Check if removing it could cause parameterization data to NOT load in some edge case

Report if this was a SAFE cleanup or a BEHAVIOR-CHANGING modification.

content.text: I'll investigate this systematically to verify if removing the `getParameterPointsProgram()` call was truly safe.

input.description: Find the specific commit that removed getParameterPointsProgram
